claims.claim_text: The theory of liberty is THE only existing solution for AI ethics.
claims.logical_form: ∀S [S = CFS_for_liberty → S ≡ authentic_religion]  →  ¬∃S′ [S′ ≠ ToL ∧ S′ solves_AI_ethics]
claims.how_stated_in_text: Challenge-method: 'produce a competing system and we will evaluate it'

claims.claim_text: Authentic religion is THE only consistent formal system for liberty.
claims.how_stated_in_text: Biconditional: CFS for liberty ↔ authentic religion (by definition + argument)
claims.prior_audit_verdict: PARTIALLY_DEMONSTRATED (right-to-left by definition; left-to-right not proven)

claims.claim_text: Tawhid is the uniquely minimal principle that grounds liberty with finite axioms.
claims.how_stated_in_text: Argued: eliminating Tawhid requires infinitely many replacement axioms

claims.claim_text: Without Resurrection, liberty is uniquely unstable (no other mechanism solves the last-round problem).
claims.how_stated_in_text: Game-theoretic argument: infinite iteration requires infinite or unknown horizon
claims.prior_audit_verdict: PARTIAL — the logical structure is valid; whether Resurrection is the ONLY solution is unstated

claims.claim_text: The Qur'an is the uniquely inimitable formal specification of the system (tahaddi challenge).
claims.how_stated_in_text: Classical i'jaz argument: challenge to produce equivalent text
claims.prior_audit_verdict: OUTSIDE_LOGICAL_SCOPE (theological claim, not subject to formal audit)

claims.claim_text: The system is consistent in the Gödel-technical sense, uniquely among normative systems.
claims.how_stated_in_text: Gödel framing: the self-application test proves consistency
claims.prior_audit_verdict: INVALID — Gödel precheck scored 44/100; P3 (arithmetic encoding) not met

claims.claim_text: States (coercive monopolies) cannot be agreement-admissible; only religion as CFS can be.
claims.how_stated_in_text: Argued: compulsion cannot be consented to ex ante by rational agents
claims.prior_audit_verdict: STRONGLY_SUPPORTED for the negative claim; the positive exclusivity is unstated

claims.claim_text: Denial of free will is self-refuting; therefore free will is the uniquely valid starting axiom.
claims.logical_form: assert(¬FW) ⊃ FW  ∴  FW is necessarily true  ∴  FW must be an axiom of any valid normative system
claims.how_stated_in_text: Performative contradiction: denying free will is self-refuting
claims.prior_audit_verdict: LOGICALLY_VALID for the self-refutation; uniqueness as starting axiom is a further inference
